case_title: KENNETH GIDNER VS. SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIDNER, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO $566.80 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $566.80, THE DAMAGES AWARDED ARE BASED ON THE DEPRECIATED VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY.
